stem: For the linear function h, the graph of y = h(x) in the xy-plane passes through the points (4, 10) and (7, 19). Which equation defines h?
rationale: Choice D is correct. Slope = (19 - 10)/(7 - 4) = 9/3 = 3. Using (4, 10): 10 = 3(4) + b → b = -2. So h(x) = 3x - 2. Verify: h(7) = 21 - 2 = 19 ✓. Choice A uses the reciprocal slope. Choice B uses one of the y-values as the intercept. Choice C has the wrong slope (using x-coordinate) and wrong intercept.
